entries.title: Touken Ranbu Touneko Danshi Cafe 5th Edition
entries.title_ja: 刀剣乱舞 刀猫男士カフェ 第5弾
entries.description: Collaboration cafe featuring Touken Ranbu's Touneko Danshi in Akihabara. Offers exclusive menus and merchandise. Advance reservations required.

entries.title: Medalist × Hyakki Yako Ver. Pop-up Store
entries.title_ja: メダリスト × 百鬼夜行Ver. ストア
entries.description: Pop-up store for the TV anime 'Medalist' with a Hyakki Yako (Night Parade of One Hundred Demons) theme. Features exclusive merchandise with newly drawn illustrations.

entries.title: Fate/Grand Order Ritsuka Fujimaru Doesn't Get It BOUQUETver. POPUPSHOP
entries.title_ja: Fate/Grand Order 藤丸立香はわからない BOUQUETver. POPUPSHOP
entries.description: Pop-up shop for 'Fate/Grand Order Ritsuka Fujimaru Doesn't Get It'. Sells original goods featuring new bouquet-themed illustrations in Shibuya.

entries.title: Touhou Project × Maid Outfit Store
entries.title_ja: 東方Project × メイド服 ストア
entries.description: Touhou Project pop-up store with a maid outfit theme at Kotobukiya Akihabara. Features a wide variety of newly drawn merchandise.

entries.title: Kotobukiya PUNI☆MOFU Ginran
entries.title_ja: コトブキヤ PUNI☆MOFU 銀ラン
entries.description: 1/1 scale plastic model kit of the cute fluffy character 'Ginran' by Kotobukiya. Features highly detailed sculpting aimed at collectors.

entries.title: Kotobukiya BULLET KNIGHTS Executioner HELL BLAZE
entries.title_ja: コトブキヤ BULLET KNIGHTS エクスキューショナー HELL BLAZE
entries.description: New addition to the 'BULLET KNIGHTS' action figure series. Features heavy proportions and allows for dynamic battle scene recreation.

entries.title: Megami Device BUSTER DOLL Knight Alice
entries.title_ja: メガミデバイス BUSTER DOLL ナイト Alice
entries.description: Kotobukiya's new Megami Device model featuring a collaboration with Honda AB12 Motocompo. Highly customizable plastic model.

entries.title: My Dress-Up Darling Desktop Cute Figure
entries.title_ja: その着せ替え人形は恋をする Desktop Cute フィギュア
entries.description: New prize figure featuring Sajuna Inui in her T-shirt version. Desktop size makes it easy and fun to display.

entries.title: BEASTARS FINAL SEASON Part 2 Premiere
entries.title_ja: BEASTARS FINAL SEASON 第2クール開始
entries.description: Part 2 of the final season of the popular anime 'BEASTARS' is now streaming on Netflix, featuring the series climax.

entries.title: Steel Ball Run Premiere
entries.title_ja: スティール・ボール・ラン 配信開始
entries.description: A new chapter of 'JoJo's Bizarre Adventure', Steel Ball Run, starts its exclusive streaming release on Netflix.

entries.title: I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and Became Unrivaled in the Real World, Too - Special
entries.title_ja: 異世界でチート能力を手にした俺は、現実世界をも無双する スペシャル
entries.description: A new TV special broadcast for the popular isekai anime. Highlights the protagonist's cheat abilities.

entries.title: Bright Fes 2026
entries.title_ja: ブライトフェス 2026
entries.description: Official free TCG event held for one day in Akihabara. A must-attend gathering for trading card game fans.

entries.title: TV Anime 'Brave Punishment' POP UP CORNER
entries.title_ja: TVアニメ『勇者刑に処す』POP UP CORNER
entries.description: GraffArt merchandise sales event for the new anime at Kotobukiya Akihabara. Many store-exclusive items available.

entries.title: School-Live! Megunee Birthday POP UP
entries.title_ja: がっこうぐらし！ めぐねえ誕生日POP UP
entries.description: Birthday memorial pop-up for 'School-Live!'. Exclusive merchandise with new illustrations available at Gamers.

entries.title: HANA × Big Echo Collab
entries.title_ja: HANA × ビッグエコー コラボ
entries.description: Collaboration campaign between 'HANA' and karaoke chain Big Echo. Enjoy limited-time collab drinks and exclusive goods.

entries.title: Ensemble Stars!! 10th Anniversary Cafe
entries.title_ja: あんさんぶるスターズ!! 10周年コラボカフェ
entries.description: Ensemble Stars 10th anniversary collaboration cafe opening in Ikebukuro and other locations. Features a captivating limited menu.

entries.title: Gnosia Pop-up Store
entries.title_ja: グノーシア ポップアップストア
entries.description: Pop-up store for the sci-fi game 'Gnosia' featuring super-deformed character goods at GEO locations across the country.

entries.title: Assassination Classroom 10th Anniversary Cafe
entries.title_ja: 暗殺教室 10周年コラボカフェ
entries.description: Anime 10th anniversary memorial cafe expanding across 4 venues including Tokyo and Osaka, starting mid-March.

entries.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - To the Hashira Training Final Screenings
entries.title_ja: 劇場版「鬼滅の刃」4月9日で終映、PVと新たな特典を公開　鬼と鬼殺隊の応援上映も
entries.description: Theatrical screenings for Demon Slayer will conclude on April 9 in most theaters. New final promotional videos and finale bonuses have been revealed, including special cheer screenings.

entries.title: Persona 3 Reload SEGA LABBIES Plushies
entries.title_ja: 「ペルソナ３ リロード」などのぬいぐるみが「SEGA LABBIES」より登場
entries.description: New plush toys for popular characters from 'Persona 3 Reload' are now available through the 'SEGA LABBIES' merchandise line.

entries.title: BOYS be MAID! × THE Chara CAFE Collaboration
entries.title_ja: BOYS be MAID! × THEキャラCAFE コラボカフェ
entries.description: A collaboration cafe themed around 'BOYS be MAID!', a work set in a maid cafe. Offers limited-edition food and drinks along with newly drawn exclusive merchandise.

entries.title: Gintama × BOX cafe&space Collaboration Cafe (Shibuya & Ikebukuro)
entries.title_ja: 銀魂 × BOX cafe&space コラボ（渋谷・池袋・ソラマチ）
entries.location: BOX cafe&space GEMS Shibuya / Grande Scape Ikebukuro / Tokyo Solamachi
entries.description: A collaboration cafe at BOX cafe&space to commemorate the release of the new Gintama theatrical film 'Yoshiwara Daiensho'. Features newly drawn visuals on menus and exclusive merchandise.

entries.title: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You - Cat Theme Store
entries.title_ja: 「100カノ」猫テーマ ストア in eeo Store 池袋本店
entries.description: A limited-time pop-up store for '100 Girlfriends' featuring an exclusive cat-themed artwork. Offers newly drawn cat-motif illustration goods and purchase bonuses.

entries.title: Kotobukiya Gakuen Idolm@ster Tamari Tsukimura -Luna say maybe- Scale Figure
entries.title_ja: コトブキヤ「学園アイドルマスター」月村手毬 -Luna say maybe-
entries.description: A new scale figure of Tamari Tsukimura from 'Gakuen Idolm@ster', showcasing her live performance costume in a standing pose with highly detailed sculpting.

entries.title: Gakuen Idolm@ster Mini Plush vol.3 - GiGO Limited Prize
entries.title_ja: 「学園アイドルマスター」ちびぐるみ ～GiGO限定～ vol.3
entries.description: The third volume of deformed mini plush toys featuring characters from 'Gakuen Idolm@ster', available exclusively as crane game prizes at GiGO arcades.

entries.title: Shunkashuuto Daiko-sha Haru no Mai TV Anime Premiere
entries.title_ja: 「春夏秋冬代行者 春の舞」TVアニメ放送開始
entries.description: TV anime adaptation of the light novel 'Shunkashuuto Daiko-sha Haru no Mai' premieres in the Spring 2026 season. A battle fantasy following the agents of the four seasons, airing on TOKYO MX and other channels.

entries.title: Chitose-kun wa Ramune-bin no Naka - Ashikaze Arc Episodes 11-13 Simulcast Special
entries.title_ja: 「千歳くんはラムネ瓶のなか」明日風編 TVアニメ第1クール（11〜13話）一挙放送
entries.description: Episodes 11-13 of the first cour (Ashikaze arc) of 'Chitose-kun wa Ramune-bin no Naka' will be broadcast consecutively, delivering the climax of the heroine Ashikaze's route.

entries.title: Nintama Rantaro Season 34 Premiere
entries.title_ja: 「忍たま乱太郎」第34シリーズ放送開始
entries.description: The long-running anime 'Nintama Rantaro' enters its 34th season on NHK E-tele. The new school year brings fresh slapstick ninja comedy airing on weekdays.

entries.title: Ghost in the Shell Anime 30th Anniversary Exhibition
entries.title_ja: 「攻殻機動隊」アニメ制作30周年記念展
entries.location: Toranomon Hills Area, Tokyo (nearest: Toranomon Hills / Kamiyacho Station)
entries.description: A large-scale exhibition commemorating the 30th anniversary of Ghost in the Shell anime production. Features original art, setting materials, and visuals from all series across the franchise.

entries.title: Gintama Spring Stroll: Keio Line Stamp Rally
entries.title_ja: 「銀魂」春のぶらり旅 ～どうせ暇だろ、コノヤロー。～
entries.location: Keio Line area (accessible from Shinjuku Station)
entries.description: A Gintama-themed stamp rally and walking event held along the Keio train line to celebrate the theatrical film release. Fans visiting designated spots along the route can earn exclusive rewards.

entries.title: Dream☆Jumbo☆Girl Vol.4: "Tens of millions of yen is cheap for my friends!"
entries.title_ja: ドリーム☆ジャンボ☆ガール４巻　「数千万円くらい仲間のためなら安いものさ！」
entries.description: Hiroyuki's manga 'Dream Jumbo Girl' Volume 4 was released on the 17th. A super happy girls' comedy starting from winning the lottery top prize.

entries.title: Idolatry Vol.3: "Junna's crazy love destroys the concept of Otaku and Oshi"
entries.title_ja: アイドラトリィ３巻　「オタクと推しという概念をぶっ壊してる循菜の狂気的な愛」
entries.description: 'Idolatry' Volume 3 by Shin Otaka & Homare was released on the 17th. Junna faces new challenges on the 3rd stage Grind Isle. Recommended by voice actress Yu Serizawa.

entries.title: Keichi Kiyuna's 'Athena-san Who Demands a Return' Vol.1: 'Runaway Beautiful Girl x Yare-yare Boy!'
entries.title_ja: 喜友名恵一　見返りを求めるアテナさん１巻　「暴走美少女×ヤレヤレ系男子！」
entries.description: Keichi Kiyuna's first manga book 'Mikaeri wo Motomeru Athena-san' Volume 1 was released on the 17th. A youth comedy featuring an incredibly out-of-control beautiful girl and an apathetic boy.

entries.title: There's a Hole in the Student Council Too! Vol.12: "Love stories are also progressing♪"
entries.title_ja: 生徒会にも穴はある！１２巻　「恋のハナシも進行中♪」
entries.description: Muchimaro's manga 'Seitokai nimo Ana wa Aru!' Volume 12 was released on the 17th. On Halloween night, a costumed Komaro visits Ume's house for a private Halloween party for two.

entries.title: The Vampire Wants to be Blood-Taken Final Vol.3: 'The fate that awaits after the blood-taking fetish is exposed'
entries.title_ja: 吸血鬼さんはチトラレたい最終３巻　「血取られ性癖がバレたその先に待つ運命は」
entries.description: Takeya Takekake's manga 'Kyuuketsuki-san wa Chitoraretai' final volume 3 was released on the 17th. The story concludes as the characters head to the sea and secrets are revealed.

entries.title: Circle nikukyu 'Yoduki Sisters' Emergency Rations 6': 'Doing the deed in the abandoned school building after class'
entries.title_ja: サークルnikukyu　夜月姉妹の非常食６　「放課後の旧校舎にて本番行為」
entries.description: Circle nikukyu's new Comitia 155 release arrives at Melonbooks Akihabara. A story about Kana, who acquired Succubus syndrome, and their risky encounters after school.

entries.title: [Digital Doujinshi Intro] Gloomy Zaibatsu Heir Makes Babies with Busty Maids: 'I Want to Impregnate Maids Even if I\'m Unpopular! Omnibus'
entries.title_ja: 【電子エロ同人紹介シリーズ】 陰キャな財閥の跡取り男子が巨乳のメイドさん達を相手に子作りHに励む「非モテでもメイドを孕ませたい！ 総集編」
entries.description: A massive 1000+ page CG collection of a gloomy heir dedicating himself to making babies with various busty maids. Features a range of interactions.

entries.title: Writhe, Adam-kun Vol.7: 'Finally crossing the line with their stepbrother!?'
entries.title_ja: 悶えてよ、アダムくん７巻　「ついに超えちゃう！？義兄との一線」
entries.description: Toyo's manga 'Modaete yo, Adam-kun' Volume 7 was released in Akihabara on the 16th. Kasari, the younger sister, finally confesses her feelings.

entries.title: Ayatsuri Calendar Vol.1: 'Doing whatever you want with schedules using a calendar app♥'
entries.title_ja: あやつりカレンダー１巻　「カレンダーアプリで予定をヤリたい放題♥」
entries.description: Tatsuki Aikawa's manga 'Ayatsuri Calendar' Volume 1 was released in Akihabara on the 16th. A story about freely manipulating an annoying boss's schedule with a magic calendar app.

entries.title: Comic Adaptation 'Comrade Girl, Shoot the Enemy' Vol.3: 'The all-female sniper platoon heads to the fierce battleground'
entries.title_ja: コミカライズ　同志少女よ、敵を撃て３巻　「女性だけの狙撃小隊は、独ソ戦の激戦地へ」
entries.description: Yuki Kamatani's manga adaptation of Toma Aisaka's novel 'Doushi Shoujo yo, Teki wo Ute' Volume 3 was released in Akihabara on the 16th. The all-female sniper platoon faces brutal reality on the frontlines.

entries.title: Chika Umino Appears on Expanded Special of 'Naoki Urasawa's Manben neo' on NHK BS
entries.title_ja: 羽海野チカ出演の「浦沢直樹の漫勉neo」拡大SPがNHK BSで、未公開シーンも
entries.description: A documentary program featuring Chika Umino, 'Naoki Urasawa's Manben neo', will air an expanded special on March 19th on NHK BS.

entries.title: 'Steel Ball Run' Anime Streaming Starts Tomorrow, New Scene Cuts Revealed
entries.title_ja: 「スティール・ボール・ラン」明日配信開始、1st STAGEの新規場面カット公開
entries.description: New scene cuts from the anime 'Steel Ball Run: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure' based on Hirohiko Araki's original work have been released.

entries.title: One Year Until School Closure: A Youth Story Capturing the School Across Four Seasons
entries.title_ja: 廃校まで1年、四季折々の校舎を写真に収め続ける少女たちの青春譚
entries.description: Nishina's manga volume 'Haru no Hikari ni Nomaretemo' (Even if Swallowed by the Spring Light) was released today, March 18th.

entries.title: Dark Fantasy of a Little Girl with Highly Poisonous Lips: 'Kiss of the Amphisbaena'
entries.title_ja: 猛毒の唇を持つ幼女のダークファンタジー「アンフィスバエナのくちづけ」
entries.description: Tetora Wakamiya's new serialization started in Monthly G Fantasy. A dark fantasy about Blue, a girl born with poisonous lips.

entries.title: Kyoko Hikawa's 'From Far Away' Gets TV Anime! Directed by Noriyuki Abe
entries.title_ja: ひかわきょうこ「彼方から」TVアニメ化！イラスト＆特報PV公開　監督は阿部記之
entries.description: To commemorate the 35th anniversary of Kyoko Hikawa's 'Kanata Kara', a TV anime adaptation has been announced with a special PV.

entries.title: Anime 'Matakoro' Main PV & Visual Released, Broadcasting Starts April 2nd
entries.title_ja: アニメ「またころ」メインPV＆ビジュアル公開、OPテーマは多次元制御機構よだか
entries.description: The TV anime 'Mata Korosarete Shimattano desu ne, Tantei-sama' will begin broadcasting on April 2nd. The OP theme is by Tajigen Seigyo Kikou Yodaka.

entries.title: An Unknown Academy on the Dark Side of Tokyo: Exorcist Action 'Ura Tokyo no Osoroshidokoro'
entries.title_ja: 東京の裏側には知られざる学園あり…除霊師学園アクション「裏東京のオソロシドコロ」
entries.description: KOJIRO's new manga serialization 'Ura Tokyo no Osoroshidokoro' started today in Weekly Shonen Magazine issue 16.

entries.title: Yonehiko Kitagawa Passes Away from Pneumonia, Known as Chairman in 'Kinnikuman'
entries.title_ja: 北川米彦が肺炎で死去　「キン肉マン」委員長役など
entries.description: Voice actor Yonehiko Kitagawa, known for his iconic roles such as the Chairman in Kinnikuman, passed away on March 5th at 94.

entries.title: A Princess Turned Chicken & Clueless Emperor Seek True Love in 'Princess of the Birdcage'
entries.title_ja: ニワトリにされた姫＆恋愛オンチの皇帝が真実の愛を求めて空回る「鳥籠のお姫様」
entries.description: Volume 1 of DOHA's 'Torikago no Ohimesama', based on mieun-lee's original work, was released today.

entries.title: A Dropout Hero Saves the World with 'Holy Light' in Comedy Adventure 'Seijun Ecstasy'
entries.title_ja: 落ちこぼれ勇者が“聖なる光”で世界を救う、エロコメ冒険譚「聖巡エクスタシー」1巻
entries.description: Volume 1 of Saku Kimura's 'Seijun Ecstasy: I'll Beat the Demons in a Room You Can't Leave Unless You Do XX' was released today.

entries.title: 'Apex Legends': 3 Special Gunpla to Commemorate Gundam Collab. Pre-orders Start March 19
entries.title_ja: 「Apex Legends」，ガンダムコラボを記念した特別なガンプラ3種が登場。3月19日12：00に数量限定で予約受付を開始
entries.description: EA Japan announced special Gunpla models to celebrate the ongoing Gundam series collaboration in 'Apex Legends'.

entries.title: 'Chaos Zero Nightmare': Final Chapter 'Heart, Promise' of Season 2 Implemented. New Fighter 'Rita' Appears
entries.title_ja: 「カオスゼロナイトメア」，銀河系災害シーズン2の最終章「心、約束」を実装。新たなサイオニック戦闘員「リタ」が登場
entries.description: Smilegate implemented the final chapter of Season 2 in the roguelike RPG 'Chaos Zero Nightmare', adding new 5-star fighters.

entries.title: 'Uma Musume Pretty Derby': New 3-Star Victoire Pisa Coming March 19
entries.title_ja: 「ウマ娘 プリティーダービー」，新★3ヴィクトワールピサ（CV：嶋野 花）を3月19日に実装。ドバイワールドCなどを勝利した競走馬がモチーフ
entries.description: Cygames announced the addition of a new 3-star character, Victoire Pisa, to the training game 'Uma Musume Pretty Derby' on March 19th.

entries.title: Persuade Grandpa for $10 Million No Matter What. New Visual Novel 'Scam Grandpa' Demo Released
entries.title_ja: なんとしてもおじいちゃんを説得して1000万ドルを引き出そう。新作ビジュアルノベル「Scam Grandpa」，体験版を配信
entries.description: BRBDrama released a demo for 'Scam Grandpa', a black humor visual novel where a grandchild tries to extract 10 million dollars from a miserly grandfather.

entries.title: Arcade Archives Version of 'Garuka' (Devastators) Releasing March 19. 1988 Konami STG
entries.title_ja: アケアカ版「餓流禍（ガルカ）」，3月19日配信。戦闘のプロが前方から迫り来る敵を撃破する，1988年にKONAMIから発売されたSTG
entries.description: Hamster announced the Arcade Archives release of Konami's 1988 vertical scrolling shooter 'Garuka' (Devastators) for March 19th.

entries.title: Enjoy a Puzzle Game at Mos Premium Stores: 'Mos Premium Theater' Preview Report
entries.title_ja: モスプレミアムの店舗で謎解きゲームを楽しめる。イベント「モスプレミアムシアター　〜トラベリン家の言い伝え〜」先行体験レポート
entries.description: Mos Burger and Sega XD will host an interactive puzzle event from March 20th to May 6th, where participants solve codes to complete a phantom recipe.

entries.title: 'Katamari' Series Celebrates its 22nd Anniversary. Plentiful Goods Info Revealed
entries.title_ja: 「塊魂」シリーズは22周年。「ならぶんです。 塊魂2」などグッズ情報を多数公開
entries.description: Bandai Namco Entertainment revealed new product information to celebrate the 22nd anniversary of the 'Katamari' series, including capsule toys.

entries.title: Merge Puzzle 'Planet Nine' Where You Shoot and Combine Planets Gets Steam Store Page
entries.title_ja: 1回のプレイ時間は2分から5分。ビリヤードのように惑星を弾いて，合体させていくマージパズル「第九惑星」，Steamストアページを公開
entries.description: Indie developer Haizai published the Steam store page for 'Ninth Planet', a planet merge puzzle game with billiards-like mechanics.

entries.title: PS5 Digital Edition Console Bundle with Two DualSense Controllers Launching April 24
entries.title_ja: PS5 デジタル・エディション本体に，2台のDualSense ワイヤレスコントローラーを同梱したセット商品が4月24日発売
entries.description: SIE announced a bundle containing the PS5 Digital Edition console and two DualSense wireless controllers, set to release on April 24th.

entries.title: Strategy Board Game 'Kakegurui ALL IN' Starts Advance Play Campaign on March 19
entries.title_ja: 戦略すごろくを楽しめる「賭ケグルイ ALL IN」，先行プレイキャンペーンを3月19日に開始
entries.description: CTW announced an advance play campaign starting March 19th for 'Kakegurui ALL IN', an upcoming game on the G123 service.

entries.title: 'Resident Evil: Requiem' Capcom Figure Builder Creator's Model Grace Ashcroft 1/6 Scale Figure
entries.title_ja: 『バイオハザード レクイエム』 カプコンフィギュアビルダー クリエイターズモデル グレース・アッシュクロフト 1/6 完成品フィギュア[カプコン]
entries.description: Check out Capcom's new Figure Builder Creator's Model for Grace Ashcroft in 1/6 scale with newly taken photos and videos.

entries.title: Empress from TV Anime 'Black★★Rock Shooter DAWN FALL' Gets a 1/4 Scale Figure!
entries.title_ja: TVアニメ『ブラック★★ロックシューターDAWN FALL』より、「エンプレス」が1/4スケールフィギュア化！
entries.description: From 'Black★★Rock Shooter DAWN FALL', Empress joins Prime 1 Studio's Ultimate Premium Masterline. Releasing July-October 2027.

entries.title: PLAfig. No.PF-04 Godzilla (2001) Plastic Model Kit [Aoshima]
entries.title_ja: PLAfig. No.PF-04 ゴジラ (2001) プラモデル[アオシマ]
entries.description: The terrifying King of the Monsters, Godzilla (2001), appears as a plastic model kit in the new brand 'PLAfig.' by Aoshima.

entries.title: From 'SSSS.GRIDMAN', 'Rikka Takarada & Akane Shinjo' Get Figures Based on Toridamono's Illustration!
entries.title_ja: 『SSSS.GRIDMAN』より、トリダモノ氏による描き下ろしイラストの「宝多六花＆新条アカネ」が立体化！
entries.description: Rikka Takarada & Akane Shinjo from 'SSSS.GRIDMAN' are getting 1/7 scale figures releasing in February 2027 by Good Smile Company.

entries.title: From the Game 'Genshin Impact', 'Columbina' in a Pure White Dress Gets a 1/8 Scale Figure!
entries.title_ja: ゲーム『原神』より、純白のワンピースに身を包んだ「コロンビーナ」が1/8スケールフィギュア化！
entries.description: From 'Genshin Impact', 'Columbina: Joyful Gathering Ver.' comes as a 1/8 scale figure scheduled for release in October 2026.

entries.title: March 2026 3rd Week: Delivering the AmiAmi Akihabara Radio Kaikan Store Exhibition!
entries.title_ja: ＜2026年3月3週目＞あみあみ秋葉原ラジオ会館店展示の様子をお届け！
entries.description: Check out the exhibition state at AmiAmi Akihabara Radio Kaikan Store for the 3rd week of March 2026, featuring trending characters.

entries.title: From 'Arknights: Endfield', 'Yvon' Gets a Figure Surrounded by Multiple Layered Displays!
entries.title_ja: 『アークナイツ：エンドフィールド』より、「イヴォンヌ」が幾重にも重なるディスプレイに囲まれた姿で立体化！
entries.description: From 'Arknights: Endfield', Yvon appears as a 1/7 scale figure scheduled for release in November 2026.

entries.title: From TV Anime 'Oshi no Ko', Hologram BIG Stands & Acrylic Keychains Available from AmiAmi!
entries.title_ja: TVアニメ『【推しの子】』より、「ホログラムBIGスタンド Vol.4」「ナウプレ♪アクリルキーホルダー」があみあみから登場！
entries.description: TV Anime 'Oshi no Ko' goods featuring Hologram BIG Stands and Acrylic Keychains with 6 lineups each are scheduled for June 2026.

entries.title: From the Drama 'Fallout', 'Lucy MacLean' Gets 1/4 Scale Figure! Pre-orders Open at Prime 1 Studio!
entries.title_ja: ドラマ『フォールアウト』から、「ルーシー・マクレーン」が1/4スケールで立体化！プライム１スタジオ オンラインストアにて予約開始！
entries.description: From Prime 1 Studio's Real Elite Masterline comes Lucy MacLean from the 'Fallout' drama. Scheduled for release June-September 2027.

entries.title: 'Girls' Frontline 2: Exilium' Springfield Queen Under the Lights Ver. 1/7 Scale Figure [Kotobukiya]
entries.title_ja: 『ドールズフロントライン2：エクシリウム』 スプリングフィールド 灯下の女王Ver. 1/7 完成品フィギュア[コトブキヤ]
entries.description: AmiAmi x Kotobukiya review project explores the highly anticipated 1/7 scale figure of Springfield Queen Under the Lights Ver.

entries.title: 'Touken Ranbu Medi Nui Collection: Toukabu / Tousute' Official Pre-orders Open March 16!
entries.title_ja: 「刀剣乱舞 めでぃぬいこれくしょん ～刀かぶ～／～刀ステ～」公式通販(国内)において3/16(月)12:00(正午)～二次受付決定！
entries.description: The 2nd and 3rd lineup of the official Touken Ranbu ONLINE media mix plushies will start pre-orders on the Nitroplus official store.

entries.title: 'Touken Ranbu Medi Nui Collection: Toumyu' Official Pre-orders Open March 9!
entries.title_ja: 「刀剣乱舞 めでぃぬいこれくしょん ～刀ミュ～」(全6種)、公式通販(国内)において3/9(月)12:00(正午)～二次受付決定！
entries.description: The 1st lineup of the official Touken Ranbu ONLINE media mix plushies (Toumyu) will start pre-orders on March 9.

entries.title: Anime Movie 'Puella Magi Madoka Magica: Walpurgisnacht Rising' Releases August 28!
entries.title_ja: 劇場アニメ『劇場版 魔法少女まどか☆マギカ〈ワルプルギスの廻天〉』8/28(金)～公開決定！
entries.description: The release date for the anime movie 'Walpurgis no Kaiten', written by Nitroplus's Gen Urobuchi, is set for August 28, 2026!

entries.title: 'Touken Ranbu ONLINE' First Ice Show 'ICE BLADE' at Yoyogi National Stadium Oct 3-4!
entries.title_ja: 『刀剣乱舞ONLINE』初のアイスショー「刀剣乱舞 - ICE BLADE -」国立代々木競技場 第一体育館で10/3(土)～4(日)開催決定！
entries.description: The very first ice show for the sword raising simulation game 'Touken Ranbu ONLINE' will take place in Tokyo on October 3-4, 2026.

entries.title: Kabuki 'Touken Ranbu: Azuma Kagami Yuki no Midare' Blu-ray Released Today!
entries.title_ja: 歌舞伎『刀剣乱舞 東鑑雪魔縁』Blu-ray、本日1/28(水)発売！
entries.description: The Blu-ray for the second Touken Ranbu Kabuki adaptation, which garnered huge acclaim in Tokyo and Kyoto, is out today.

entries.title: 'Touken Ranbu Medi Nui Collection: Toukabu / Tousute' Releasing Early July!
entries.title_ja: 「刀剣乱舞 めでぃぬいこれくしょん ～刀かぶ～／～刀ステ～」7月上旬に発売決定！　公式通販(国内)において本日1/23(金)～2/20(金)12:00(正午)の期間限定で予約受付中!!
entries.description: New additions to the Touken Ranbu Medi Nui official plushie series featuring characters from the Kabuki and Stage play adaptations.

entries.title: 'Touken Ranbu ONLINE 10th Anniversary Memorial Book' Available on Official Store!
entries.title_ja: 「刀剣乱舞ONLINE十周年記念　本丸録」本日1/20(火)12:00(正午)～公式通販(国内／海外向け)で取り扱い決定！
entries.description: The gorgeous memorial book celebrating the 10th anniversary of Touken Ranbu ONLINE will be available on the official Nitroplus store.

entries.title: 'Nitro Face Collection' Acrylic Keychains Available for Limited Pre-order!
entries.title_ja: 「ニトロお顔コレクション」公式通販(国内／海外向け)において本日1/7(水)～16(金)12:00(正午)の期間限定で予約受付中！
entries.description: Pre-orders have opened for the 'Nitro Face Collection' featuring 50 characters from Nitroplus, Nitro Origin, and Nitro Chiral works.

entries.title: Happy New Year!
entries.title_ja: あけましておめでとうございます！
entries.description: Thank you for supporting Nitroplus content last year. Our staff will continue to do our best to deliver enjoyable content this year.

entries.title: 'Comiket 107' Held December 30-31!
entries.title_ja: 「コミックマーケット107」12/30(火)～31(水)いよいよ開催！
entries.description: Comic Market 107 will be held at Tokyo Big Sight! We've prepared a 2.4m giant gacha machine at the Nitroplus booth.

entries.title: Touken Ranbu Medi Nui Collection: Toukabu
entries.title_ja: 刀剣乱舞 めでぃぬいこれくしょん ～刀かぶ～
entries.description: Official plushies of the Touken Ranbu ONLINE media mix works! The 2nd lineup features 6 characters from the Kabuki adaptation.

entries.title: Touken Ranbu Medi Nui Collection: Tousute
entries.title_ja: 刀剣乱舞 めでぃぬいこれくしょん ～刀ステ～
entries.description: Official plushies of the Touken Ranbu ONLINE media mix works! The 3rd lineup features 6 characters from the Stage Play adaptation.

entries.title: Nitro Face Collection
entries.title_ja: ニトロお顔コレクション
entries.description: Acrylic keychains featuring the 'faces' of 9 characters from Nitroplus works. Large size with roughly 10-13cm long sides.

entries.title: Touken Ranbu Medi Nui Collection: Toumyu
entries.title_ja: 刀剣乱舞 めでぃぬいこれくしょん ～刀ミュ～
entries.description: Official plushies of the Touken Ranbu ONLINE media mix works! The 1st lineup features 6 characters from the Musical adaptation.

entries.title: Touken Ranbu ONLINE Official Setting Material Book Vol.5 'Touken Ranbu Kenran Zuroku Go'
entries.title_ja: 『刀剣乱舞ONLINE』公式設定画集第5弾「刀剣乱舞絢爛図録 五」
entries.description: The 5th official visual book covering the Touken Danshi from Touken Ranbu ONLINE is set for release in December 2025!

entries.title: 'Touken Ranbu Kenran Zuroku Go' Digital Edition
entries.title_ja: 「刀剣乱舞絢爛図録 五」電子書籍版
entries.description: The digital edition of the 5th official visual book covering the Touken Danshi from Touken Ranbu ONLINE will be available simultaneously!

entries.title: The Choice History of 'Choices': How Nitroplus Scenario Writers Make Novel Games
entries.title_ja: 「選択肢」の選択史 ニトロプラスのシナリオライターはノベルゲームをどう作ってきたか(星海社新書)
entries.description: A new paperback book discussing novel game scenario writing by Nitroplus writer Baio Shimokura is coming from Seikaisha!

entries.title: Blu-ray & DVD 'Thunderbolt Fantasy: Sword Seekers Final Chapter'
entries.title_ja: Blu-ray＆DVD「Thunderbolt Fantasy 東離劍遊紀 最終章」
entries.description: The finale of the martial arts fantasy puppet show 'Thunderbolt Fantasy Project' directed by Gen Urobuchi comes to Blu-ray & DVD.

entries.title: Digital Edition 'Thunderbolt Fantasy: Sword Seekers Final Chapter Pamphlet'
entries.title_ja: 「Thunderbolt Fantasy 東離劍遊紀 最終章 パンフレット」電子書籍版
entries.description: The official pamphlet for the final theatrical release of the Thunderbolt Fantasy Project is now available as a digital book!

entries.title: Digital Edition 'Thunderbolt Fantasy Gaiden Short Stories'
entries.title_ja: 「Thunderbolt Fantasy 外伝小噺」電子書籍版
entries.description: The short story collection originally distributed as a theatrical bonus for 'Thunderbolt Fantasy Final Chapter' is now a digital book!
